text.en: Gemini Models
text.th: Gemini Models

text.en: With Gemini Omni, Gemini’s ability to reason meets the ability to create, while Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.
text.th: With Gemini Omni, Gemini’s ability to reason meets the ability to create, while Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.

text.en: Your browser does not support the audio element.
text.th: Your browser does not support the audio element.

text.en: At Google I/O 2026, we announced our latest models: Gemini Omni and the Gemini 3.5 family of models.
text.th: At Google I/O 2026, we announced our latest models: Gemini Omni and the Gemini 3.5 family of models.

text.en: Gemini Omni is our new model that can create anything from any input, starting with video. With Omni, you can combine images, audio, video and text as input and generate high-quality videos grounded in Gemini's real-world knowledge. You can also easily edit your videos through conversation.
text.th: Gemini Omni is our new model that can create anything from any input, starting with video. With Omni, you can combine images, audio, video and text as input and generate high-quality videos grounded in Gemini's real-world knowledge. You can also easily edit your videos through conversation.

text.en: Then there’s Gemini 3.5, our latest family of models combining frontier intelligence with action. This represents a major leap forward in building more capable, intelligent agents. We’re kicking off the series by releasing 3.5 Flash. It delivers frontier performance for agents and coding, excelling at complex long-horizon tasks that deliver real-world utility.
text.th: Then there’s Gemini 3.5, our latest family of models combining frontier intelligence with action. This represents a major leap forward in building more capable, intelligent agents. We’re kicking off the series by releasing 3.5 Flash. It delivers frontier performance for agents and coding, excelling at complex long-horizon tasks that deliver real-world utility.

text.en: To give you a clearer understanding of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 Flash, here are 9 demos of what they can help you do.
text.th: To give you a clearer understanding of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 Flash, here are 9 demos of what they can help you do.

text.en: Gemini Omni
text.th: Gemini Omni

text.en: Edit your videos through conversation. One capability that makes Omni special is that it gives you an easier way to edit video — with natural language. Every instruction builds on the last. Your characters stay consistent, the physics hold up and the scene remembers what came before. That means you can transform the world around you. Change specific things, or change everything. Your video becomes the starting point for something you never could have filmed yourself.
text.th: Edit your videos through conversation. One capability that makes Omni special is that it gives you an easier way to edit video — with natural language. Every instruction builds on the last. Your characters stay consistent, the physics hold up and the scene remembers what came before. That means you can transform the world around you. Change specific things, or change everything. Your video becomes the starting point for something you never could have filmed yourself.

text.en: Prompt: Make the sculpture out of bubbles.
text.th: Prompt: Make the sculpture out of bubbles.

text.en: Reimagine the action. Take a video you shot and just ask Omni to change what’s happening. Edit the action, add in new characters or objects or transform a moment into something unexpected.
text.th: Reimagine the action. Take a video you shot and just ask Omni to change what’s happening. Edit the action, add in new characters or objects or transform a moment into something unexpected.

text.en: Prompt: Dim the lights in the room. Put a black and white checkerboard room inside a glass sphere that floats tracking above the hand, inside it contains a recursive representation of the same hand holding the sphere, creating an infinite recursive of rooms. Camera slowly gets closer into the sphere, creating a video loop.
text.th: Prompt: Dim the lights in the room. Put a black and white checkerboard room inside a glass sphere that floats tracking above the hand, inside it contains a recursive representation of the same hand holding the sphere, creating an infinite recursive of rooms. Camera slowly gets closer into the sphere, creating a video loop.

text.en: Refine your videos across multiple turns. Change the environment, angle, style or even specific details, without ever losing the thread of your original scene. Scroll through the carousel to see how edits build on each other.
text.th: Refine your videos across multiple turns. Change the environment, angle, style or even specific details, without ever losing the thread of your original scene. Scroll through the carousel to see how edits build on each other.

text.en: Gemini 3.5 Flash
text.th: Gemini 3.5 Flash

text.en: Take on agentic tasks at scale. 3.5 Flash delivers intelligence that rivals large flagship models on multiple dimensions, at the speeds you have come to expect from the Flash series. This balance of speed and performance makes 3.5 Flash ideal for tackling long-horizon agentic tasks. Here, powered by Antigravity, 3.5 Flash executes multi-step workflows to automatically rename and categorize unstructured assets based on dynamic criteria.
text.th: Take on agentic tasks at scale. 3.5 Flash delivers intelligence that rivals large flagship models on multiple dimensions, at the speeds you have come to expect from the Flash series. This balance of speed and performance makes 3.5 Flash ideal for tackling long-horizon agentic tasks. Here, powered by Antigravity, 3.5 Flash executes multi-step workflows to automatically rename and categorize unstructured assets based on dynamic criteria.

text.en: 3.5 Flash powered by Antigravity
text.th: 3.5 Flash powered by Antigravity

text.en: When coupled with the updated Antigravity harness, 3.5 Flash becomes a powerful engine for deploying collaborative subagents to tackle problems at scale for the most demanding use cases. Under supervision, it can reliably execute multi-step workflows and coding tasks while sustaining frontier performance.
text.th: When coupled with the updated Antigravity harness, 3.5 Flash becomes a powerful engine for deploying collaborative subagents to tackle problems at scale for the most demanding use cases. Under supervision, it can reliably execute multi-step workflows and coding tasks while sustaining frontier performance.

text.en: Create richer, more interactive web UIs and graphics with 3.5 Flash. 3.5 Flash builds on the strong multimodal foundation of Gemini 3. Watch as 3.5 Flash generates different UX approaches for a checkout flow in just 60 seconds on AI Studio.
text.th: Create richer, more interactive web UIs and graphics with 3.5 Flash. 3.5 Flash builds on the strong multimodal foundation of Gemini 3. Watch as 3.5 Flash generates different UX approaches for a checkout flow in just 60 seconds on AI Studio.

text.en: 3.5 Flash on AI Studio
text.th: 3.5 Flash on AI Studio

text.en: Try personal AI agents and new intelligent experiences. 3.5 Flash is now the default model for the Gemini app and AI Mode in Search globally. Its agentic capabilities are powering new features to bring frontier-level intelligence to your daily life.
text.th: Try personal AI agents and new intelligent experiences. 3.5 Flash is now the default model for the Gemini app and AI Mode in Search globally. Its agentic capabilities are powering new features to bring frontier-level intelligence to your daily life.

text.en: The enhanced agentic coding capabilities of 3.5 Flash are delivering even more intelligent experiences in Search, like our new information agents. Operating in the background, 24/7, these agents intelligently reason across information to find exactly what you need at exactly the right moment. They will send a comprehensive update along with links to the web to dive deeper, so you can take action. Information agents will launch first for Google AI Pro & Ultra subscribers this summer.
text.th: The enhanced agentic coding capabilities of 3.5 Flash are delivering even more intelligent experiences in Search, like our new information agents. Operating in the background, 24/7, these agents intelligently reason across information to find exactly what you need at exactly the right moment. They will send a comprehensive update along with links to the web to dive deeper, so you can take action. Information agents will launch first for Google AI Pro & Ultra subscribers this summer.

text.en: An information agent keeps a user updated on whether any of their favorite athletes announce sneaker collabs or signature drops.
text.th: An information agent keeps a user updated on whether any of their favorite athletes announce sneaker collabs or signature drops.

text.en: Now that we’re bringing the power of Google Antigravity and agentic coding capabilities of Gemini 3.5 Flash right into Search, Search can build the ideal response, in the right format for your question — completely on the fly. So you can get custom generative UI, including visual tools and simulations, tailored precisely to your needs. These generative UI capabilities will be available for everyone in Search this summer, free of charge.
text.th: Now that we’re bringing the power of Google Antigravity and agentic coding capabilities of Gemini 3.5 Flash right into Search, Search can build the ideal response, in the right format for your question — completely on the fly. So you can get custom generative UI, including visual tools and simulations, tailored precisely to your needs. These generative UI capabilities will be available for everyone in Search this summer, free of charge.

text.en: Search leverages 3.5 Flash to build an interactive visual explaining Gyroid patterns.
text.th: Search leverages 3.5 Flash to build an interactive visual explaining Gyroid patterns.

text.en: For your ongoing tasks like planning a wedding or establishing a new fitness routine, Search will also build you custom experiences – like dashboards, trackers or mini apps – that you can keep coming back to. You’ll be able to create your own custom experiences with Antigravity right in Search in the coming months, starting first for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in the U.S.
text.th: For your ongoing tasks like planning a wedding or establishing a new fitness routine, Search will also build you custom experiences – like dashboards, trackers or mini apps – that you can keep coming back to. You’ll be able to create your own custom experiences with Antigravity right in Search in the coming months, starting first for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in the U.S.

text.en: Search builds a custom fitness tracker.
text.th: Search builds a custom fitness tracker.

text.en: Then there’s the new Gemini Spark, your personal AI agent, which runs on Gemini 3.5 and uses the Antigravity harness. It runs 24/7, helping you navigate your digital life, taking action on your behalf while under your direction. It’s deeply integrated with the Workspace tools you rely on daily, like Gmail, Docs, Slides and more. Gemini Spark is now available to all Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S.
text.th: Then there’s the new Gemini Spark, your personal AI agent, which runs on Gemini 3.5 and uses the Antigravity harness. It runs 24/7, helping you navigate your digital life, taking action on your behalf while under your direction. It’s deeply integrated with the Workspace tools you rely on daily, like Gmail, Docs, Slides and more. Gemini Spark is now available to all Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S.

text.en: Gemini Spark creates a list of nut-free snacks, then adds them to Instacart.
text.th: Gemini Spark creates a list of nut-free snacks, then adds them to Instacart.

text.en: Gemini Omni Flash is rolling out to all Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers globally through the Gemini app and Google Flow. It’s also rolling out at no cost to users on YouTube Shorts and YouTube Create App. In the coming weeks, we'll also be rolling it out to developers and enterprise customers via APIs.
text.th: Gemini Omni Flash is rolling out to all Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers globally through the Gemini app and Google Flow. It’s also rolling out at no cost to users on YouTube Shorts and YouTube Create App. In the coming weeks, we'll also be rolling it out to developers and enterprise customers via APIs.

text.en: Gemini 3.5 Flash is generally available via Google Antigravity, the Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Android Studio, Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Gemini Enterprise. It’s also available for everyone in AI Mode in Search and now rolling out to everyone globally in the Gemini app.
text.th: Gemini 3.5 Flash is generally available via Google Antigravity, the Gemini API in Google AI Studio and Android Studio, Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Gemini Enterprise. It’s also available for everyone in AI Mode in Search and now rolling out to everyone globally in the Gemini app.
